prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests Found

No new device requests with unique fingerprints were found in the analyzed GitHub activity.

## Fingerprints Already Supported

1. **Motion Sensor** (_TZE200_kb5noeto) - Supported by `presence_sensor_radar` driver.
   - [Issue #163](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/163)

2. **Fingerbot Plus** (_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v) - Supported by `curtain_motor` and `fingerbot` drivers.
   - [Issue #869](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate

Several fingerprints from forks have been identified that could be integrated into the main repository:

1. **Tuya PIR sensor** (_TZ3000_c8ozah8n) - Added in [PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166) by `chernals`.
2. **TS110E driver** (_TZ3210_ngqk6jia, _TZ3210_weaqkhab) - Added in [PR #1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) by `PiTRiS87`.
3. **Three new devices** (_TZE200_pay2byax, _TZ3000_mrpevh8p) - Added in [PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) by `Peter-Celica`.
4. **Fingerprint** (_TZ3000_gjrubzje) - Added in [PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219) by `Melectro1`.
5. **Fingerprint** (_TZE204_dapwryy7) - Added in [PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218) by `Melectro1`.
6. **Fingerprint** (_TZE204_bjzrowv2) - Added in [PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195) by `YuriEstevan`.

## PRs with Useful Changes

1. **Update driver.compose.json** (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c) - Merged in [PR #45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45) by `vl14-dev`.
2. **Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor** (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c) - Not merged in [PR #46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46) by `vl14-dev`.

These PRs and fingerprints should be reviewed and integrated as appropriate to enhance the functionality and compatibility of the Universal Tuya Zigbee app.
